title: Mob Tracing
description: Real-time entity AI preview. you can directly see the mob paths, aggro zones, attack target, and look direction in the world.
body:
# Mob Tracing

Always wondered what's going through the mind of a mob? Mob Tracing displays exactly that in real time. Where they are going, what they're reacting to, how far their senses can extend.

Extremely useful for mod creators testing their mob behavior, but it's also quite fun in vanilla as well. Track a zombies path towards you, see how close you need to be for a skeleton to spot you.

## Shows

- Complete pathfinding trace (how the mob found the current route it's traveling along from start to finish)
- Start/end points for the traced route
- Aggro radius as a visual bubble surrounding the mob (works for hostiles, also for pacified mobs too, like when an animal is trailing you after you show them food)

Toggle with F7 (Adjustable). All settings accessible with Mod Menu.

## Dependencies

- Fabric API
- Mod Menu (Optional)


Note: This mod reads and displays client-side AI data. Some servers may flag it as a cheat client or unfair advantage. Use at your own risk — I take no responsibility for any bans or punishments resulting from its use.
